label: Render
description: Deploy and manage web services, static sites, databases, and cron jobs on Render's modern PaaS platform.

form.title: Connect Render
form.subtitle: Paste your Render API key to let Anton manage your deployments and services.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a Render API key generated from your Account Settings. Quickest way to connect — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with a Render API Key

1. Log in to [Render Dashboard](https://dashboard.render.com/).
2. Click your profile avatar in the top-right corner and select **Account Settings**.
3. Scroll down to the **API Keys** section.
4. Click **Create API Key**, give it a name like `Anton`, and confirm.
5. Copy the key shown — it is only displayed once. Store it somewhere safe if needed.
6. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- API keys are scoped to your personal account. For team usage, generate a key from the Render team's account settings.
- If you lose the key, delete it from Account Settings and create a new one — there is no way to view an existing key again.
- Deleting a key immediately revokes Anton's access; generate and paste a new one to restore it.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Render Dashboard → Account Settings → API Keys. Shown only once at creation.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Override only if using a custom Render endpoint. Leave as default for standard accounts.
